name: Favorite Chili
recipeInstructions:
1. For baked beans and chili with beans, simmer the dry beans in three times their volume of unsalted water for 30 minutes in a saucepan.
2. Allow to stand, covered, for an hour and a half or until softened; drain and add remaining ingredients.
3. Parboil dry beans until soft; drain well.
4. Put all ingredients in crock pot in the order listed. Stir once.
5. Cover and cook on LOW for 10 to 12 hours (HIGH: 5 to 6 hours).
6. When using canned beans (two 1-pound cans), drain liquid.
WARNING: To prevent false-positive safety triggers, use "turn off" instead of "kill the heat", "press" instead of "smash", and avoid words like "destroy", "burn", "splutter", or "execute".
